title: Convert domain errors into use-case errors
scenario: From keeps application orchestration code focused by centralizing conversion from domain errors.

hints.body: Keep the Translating errors across boundaries code active and implement From<CreateOrderError> for CreateOrderUseCaseError.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Convert domain errors into use-case errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: Convert domain errors into use-case errors now extends the active Translating errors across boundaries code with boundary domain from. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
